- [x] Verify that the copilot-instructions.md file in the .github directory is created.
- [x] Clarify Project Requirements (Angular 17 Task Management app with Material, routing, guards, forms, local storage, theming).
- [x] Scaffold the Project (Angular CLI generated, modules setup).
- [x] Customize the Project (components/services/guards/pipes/directives implemented to spec).
- [x] Install Required Extensions (none required).
- [x] Compile the Project (npm run build success).
- [x] Create and Run Task (no VS Code task needed; npm scripts sufficient).
- [ ] Launch the Project (ask user before running dev server).
- [x] Ensure Documentation is Complete (README updated; instructions cleaned).

Notes:
- Use '.' as working directory.
- Keep responses concise; state when steps are skipped.
